item.name: Construct VI-S Core
item.description: The golem summoned by this core is painted red so it goes faster. Painting the core itself red, however, does not appear to offer any discernible benefit.

mount.name: Construct VI-S
mount.action: Summon forth your Construct VI-S. Painted red so it goes faster. Theoretically.
mount.description: This flashy golem was constructed by a band of commerce-minded kobolds hoping to establish regular trade with their seafaring neighbors. Coated in Lominsan red, propulsion power is apparently enhanced by as much as thirty percent.
mount.tooltip:
No one'll tell me what the
bloody “S” stands for...
- Lieutenant Skaetswys
